g.text: Inspect model IDs and trace links
kind is Constraint, MddViewer::ocl_ui shows a
rendered texture through a center-fixed fisheye mesh
content compresses toward the edges, corners stay put.
Layered on the scroll-at-cursor base zoom; drag pans.
The toolbar has no Reset / Zoom + / Zoom - buttons
(removed). Zoom is scroll-only at the cursor; pan is
drag-only. A small hint label replaces the buttons.
inner-edge chevron; clicking it sets PanelLayout
collapsed and the panel shrinks to an exact-width
sliver button that re-expands on click. Realized by
Reads pre-rendered SVGs from .mdd/rendered/. If no
models are mapped/rendered the canvas shows "No
rendered output". Text rendering is realized by
registers them once through eframe's CreationContext.
project.deploy_files() as a third source; update()
builds deploy_tree and renders a "DEPLOY" header
the rail-mode match, so it shows in Directory AND
By-cycle. Clicking a leaf -> lookup_file -> load_file
canvas (same placeholder as any unrendered model if
